sentences.arabic: أَرَادَتِ الْأُمُّ أَنْ تُكَلِّمَ ابْنَهَا فِي الْخَارِجِ.
sentences.translation: Majka je htjela razgovarati sa sinom u inostranstvu.
sentences.translationEn: The mother wanted to talk to her son abroad.

sentences.arabic: فَتَحَتِ التَّطْبِيقَ عَلَى هَاتِفِهَا وَضَغَطَتِ الِاتِّصَالَ.
sentences.translation: Otvorila je aplikaciju na telefonu i pritisnula poziv.
sentences.translationEn: She opened the app on her phone and pressed call.

sentences.translation: Vidjela je njegovo lice na ekranu i obradovala se.
sentences.translationEn: She saw his face on the screen and was happy.

sentences.translation: Dugo su razgovarali dok se ona smiješila.
sentences.translationEn: They talked for a long time and she smiled.
